channel.title: Posts on BCA PDF Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on BCA PDF Hub

item.title: Mera Pehla Hugo Blog
item.description:
Swagat hai aapka mere blog par!

Yeh meri pehli post hai jo maine Hugo aur GitHub ka use karke banayi hai.

Maine kya-kya seekha:

  1. Hugo ka local server kaise chalate hain (hugo server).
  2. Markdown mein formatting kaise karte hain.
  3. Ab bas ise GitHub par push karna baaki hai!

“Static sites fast hoti hain, aur Hugo unmein sabse best hai.”

Main jaldi hi aur bhi posts likhunga. Tab tak ke liye, Happy Coding! 🚀
